achievements.name: Front Page
achievements.description: Put your first Evening Edition to bed.

achievements.name: I Laminate My Alibis
achievements.description: Clear Poppy the only correct way.

achievements.name: You Believed Me Enough to Check
achievements.description: Verify Milo's story with your own eyes.

achievements.name: Truth With Compassion
achievements.description: Finish the story the way Archie would have.

achievements.name: Careful Hands
achievements.description: Feel the truth before the story names it.

achievements.name: A Town, Not a Story
achievements.description: Keep every promise: Margie's quote corroborated, Clara's trust never printed, Milo never named.

achievements.name: The Lantern Counter
achievements.description: Photograph every gas lantern in the district.
